scripts.sync: npm install && npm run db:setup && npm run codegen -w web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w api" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w api && npm run build -w web
scripts.infra:synth: npm run build -w web && npm run synth --prefix infra
scripts.infra:deploy: npm run build -w web && npm run deploy --prefix infra
